steps: Profile → Edit profile: change Name (nickname) and Username to your current name (the username can change once every 30 days).
Delete, or set to private, old videos that show your former name.
Review your bio and any linked accounts for the former name.
deadnameRemoval.limits: The username can only change every 30 days, and an old @handle may be reused by someone else.
deadnameRemoval.escalation: Use the report flow for harassment, or for content others posted about you.

steps: Settings → Privacy: set the account to private if you want.
Limit who can comment, duet, or download your videos.
Turn off “Suggest your account to others”.
